A private journaling app for capturing m: A private journaling app for capturing memories, notes, and relationships between ideas.
Constellation helps you keep diary entri: Constellation helps you keep diary entries, notes, reminders, images, and visual connections in one private space.
Built with Laravel, Livewire, Alpine.js,: Built with Laravel, Livewire, Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS, and D3.js.
Constellation is designed for authentica: Constellation is designed for authenticated users only. Search engine crawling is disabled, and account access is protected by login rate limiting. User data unencrypted. Don't store sensitive information you don't want me to potentially see!
Constellation is an independent solo-dev: Constellation is an independent solo-developer project and is closed-source software.
